# Hendra's Note: 
This repo is at very early stage of creating and utilizing github.io to create my website, using Jekyll static website generator. This site is using Jekyll theme: Adam Blog 2.0 by [Armando Maynez](https://github.com/amaynez). Please see his Github site for more info about Jekyll (and why using it), as well as Adam Blog 2.0 theme features.

# Status: 
WIP (Work in Progress). 

## Questions?

This theme is completely free and open source software. You may use it however you want, as it is distributed under the [MIT License](http://choosealicense.com/licenses/mit/). If you are having any problems, any questions or suggestions, feel free to  [file a GitHub issue](https://github.com/the-mvm/the-mvm.github.io/issues/new).
